intent: Sole sweep fixture for 1s_1br_wd_side_split_bath_gr -- 10x8 m lot, 24.0 m2 buildable floor, matching this topology's canonical scale. Deliberately restricted to compact/min only (2026-07-20): larger sizes (med/max) are now served by the sibling LDK topology 1s_1br_wd_side_split_bath_ld instead -- min is always the gr topology's job, ldk is med/max only (the ld sibling is infeasible at this 10x8 size, confirmed empirically).
